---
title: "🤖 Agentic AI"
listing:
  contents: notes/agentic
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, depth, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    depth: "Depth"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Agents and evals - building things that act, and measuring whether they act well.
